title: euonymus europaeus subsp. tenuifolius
intro: Euonymus europaeus subsp. tenuifolius, also known as the European spindle, is a subspecies of deciduous shrub or small tree native to Europe. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which can help to treat a range of health issues, including wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Euonymus europaeus subsp. tenuifolius include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve skin health, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the bark and leaves of the European spindle can be made into a tea, infusion, or tincture, which can be used to treat a variety of ailments and promote overall well-being.
